metadata.title: Samuele La Fleur — Full Stack Developer
metadata.description: Personal portfolio of Samuele La Fleur, Full Stack Developer based in Switzerland. TypeScript, React, Next.js, Node.js, AWS.

hero.tagline: 4+ years building scalable web and mobile applications across healthcare, Web3, and SaaS. TypeScript, React, Node.js, cloud-native on AWS.

about.heading: A developer who ships.
about.p1: I'm a full-stack developer based between Ticino and Basel, focused on building products people actually rely on — from hospital-grade EHR systems to Web3 marketplaces and serverless SaaS platforms.
about.p2: My work sits at the intersection of a clean frontend and a solid backend: TypeScript everywhere, React and Next.js on top, Node.js, NestJS, or Spring Boot underneath, deployed on AWS with CI/CD I own end-to-end.
about.personalLine: Off the keyboard: gym & training, music across genres, AC Milan.

contact.heading: Let's talk.
contact.intro: Have a role, a project, or just want to say hi? The fastest way to reach me is right here — or through any of the channels below.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell me a bit about the role or project...
contact.success: Thanks — your message is on its way.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email me directly.
